message.content:
@startuml
class Observer {
    title "Observer"
    note right of "Observer"
    notify(event: ManagerEvent)
}

class System {
    title "System"
    note right of "System"
    managedTypes: List<ComponentType>
    filteredEntities: List<Entity>
    addEntityRef(): Unit
    removeEntityRef(): Unit
    update(): Unit
    checkEntityISCompatible(): Unit
}

class ComponentType {
    title "ComponentType"
    note right of "ComponentType"
    DIRECTION,
    POSITION,
    SPEED,
    SPAWN,
    ...
}

class Entity {
    title "Entity"
    note right of "Entity"
    ID: Int
    components: Map<ComponentType, Component>
}

class Component {
    title "Component"
    note right of "Component"
    type: ComponentType
}

class EntityManager {
    title "EntityManager"
    note right of "EntityManager"
    entities: List<Entity>
    systems: Set<Observer>
    subscribe(system: Observer)
    addEntity(entity: Entity)
    removeEntity(id: Int)
    notifySystems(event: ManagerEvent)
}

class ProductType {
    title "Product Type"
}

class Note {
    title "Note"
    note right of "Entity"
    Module + Case Class
}

class Note2 {
    title "Note"
    note right of "Component"
    Module + Case Class
}

Observer <|-- System
System ..> ComponentType
System ..> Entity
System ..> Component
System ..> EntityManager
EntityManager ..> System
EntityManager ..> Component
EntityManager ..> ComponentType
EntityManager ..> Observer
EntityManager ..> Entity
Entity ..> Component
Component ..> ComponentType
Component ..> EntityManager
Component ..> Entity
Entity ..> ProductType
Component ..> ProductType
Entity ..> Note
Component ..> Note2
@enduml
